_comment: Curated semantics for the System Nervous System map. The generator (bootstrap/generate-system-nervous-system.sh) joins each subsystem with the enriched SYSTEM_REGISTRY.json: owner_file and validator are verified to exist (as a registry entry / bootstrap script) and downstream_impact is read from the owner_file's registry downstream_policy. purpose/failure_mode/recovery are human-authored. Keep this list to MAJOR subsystems — it is the one-page 'what matters first' control map, not a file index (that is CAPABILITIES.md / SYSTEM_REGISTRY.json).

subsystems.title: Instruction layer & precedence
subsystems.purpose: Defines which repo-local files are authoritative and in what order agents obey them.
subsystems.failure_mode: Agents follow the wrong/contradicting instructions or a host overlay overrides repo truth.

subsystems.title: Context routing & load order
subsystems.purpose: Tells an agent what to read first and which task-specific bundle to load instead of the whole repo.
subsystems.failure_mode: Agent misses required context or loads the wrong files and acts on stale assumptions.

subsystems.title: Registry contract graph
subsystems.purpose: Enforced topology of every managed file: authority, owner, validator, downstream policy, drift severity.
subsystems.failure_mode: A managed file drifts, becomes an orphan, or a critical file loses validator coverage.

subsystems.title: Integrity signing
subsystems.purpose: HMAC-signed manifest proving managed files are unmodified since the last sign.
subsystems.failure_mode: Tampered or corrupted managed file goes undetected, or a stale manifest blocks updates.

subsystems.title: Validation & doctor
subsystems.purpose: Single structural+integrity+awareness health gate agents run before and after work.
subsystems.failure_mode: Repo is structurally broken but work proceeds anyway.

subsystems.title: Scaffold & isolation
subsystems.purpose: Copies the template into a new app repo with correct include/exclude and no cross-repo bleed.
subsystems.failure_mode: Scaffold leaks factory/MOS surfaces downstream or contaminates another repo.

subsystems.title: App identity & definition
subsystems.purpose: Distinguishes parent-template from a blank downstream app and blocks coding before the app is defined.
subsystems.failure_mode: A blank app repo turns into a random codebase, or the template is edited as if it were an app.

subsystems.title: Project-local self-improvement
subsystems.purpose: Safe detect->propose->apply->validate->record loop, local-only, never mutating the parent template.
subsystems.failure_mode: A downstream improvement escapes its repo or a self-write damages the operating layer.

subsystems.title: Agent coordination & locks
subsystems.purpose: Lease-based locks and live roster so multiple agents do not collide on shared state.
subsystems.failure_mode: Two agents edit the same operating surface and lose each other's writes.

subsystems.title: MCP project isolation
subsystems.purpose: Keeps MCP server config and identity scoped to this repo, never bleeding across projects.
subsystems.failure_mode: MCP config or app-id from another repo bleeds into this one.

subsystems.title: Host adapters
subsystems.purpose: Generated per-host instruction surfaces (Claude/Codex/Gemini/Cursor/Copilot/Windsurf/Antigravity) from AGENTS.md.
subsystems.failure_mode: A host adapter drifts from the canonical contract and instructs an agent incorrectly.

subsystems.title: Git mirror & discipline
subsystems.purpose: Local-authoritative single-main mirror model; GitHub is a backup, not the source of truth.
subsystems.failure_mode: Branch sprawl, divergent main, or treating the remote as authoritative.

subsystems.title: Quality & evidence
subsystems.purpose: Scores world-class quality and verifies claims are backed by evidence.
subsystems.failure_mode: Quality silently regresses or success is claimed without evidence.

subsystems.title: Release readiness
subsystems.purpose: Versioned platform release train with sealed, checksummed release packets.
subsystems.failure_mode: An unvalidated or unreproducible template state ships to the fleet.
